source.snippet: THIS DEED, Made this 22 day of Dec. 1875 by Daniel Bertran and wife Sarah Jane ... to Alfred A. Gordon...

extraction_warnings: Gold label is based on the public FromThePage human transcription; the downloaded PDF itself is handwritten and should route through OCR/VLM fallback.
Only the visible public transcription was used; no legal description or consideration appears in the visible transcription excerpt.
J. N. Nelson is captured as a probate official using the closest available PartyParty role because the schema does not include a judge/notary role.
